items.translation: близко к сердцу, очень важно для меня
items.example: Teaching reading is an issue that's close to my heart.
Coastal countries like mine are running out of time.

items.idiom: hit the nail on the head
items.example: This hits the nail on the head: we will eradicate old illnesses, but new ones will develop.
Let's face it: the world will be completely overcrowded.

items.translation: ляпнуть что-то не то / попасть впросак
items.example: I said the wrong thing again. I always put my foot in it.
Socialising is really not my cup of tea.
We forgot to pay our taxes. Now we're in hot water.
I thought the exam would be a piece of cake, but it wasn't.
I want to get out of the rat race and live a simpler life.
Could you keep an eye on my bag while I go to the toilet?
